title: tragacantha variabilis
intro: Tragacantha variabilis, also known as the variable or devil's thorn, is a type of plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha variabilis include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
